ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator, parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "section" INTEGER /* Section the student belongs to */,
  "year_level" INTEGER /* Year level of the student */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "student_image_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student_images table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_student_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_image_id") REFERENCES student_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_section FOREIGN KEY ("section") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_year_level FOREIGN KEY ("year_level") REFERENCES year_levels ("year_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Teacher in charge of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "year_levels" (
  "year_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year level */,
  "year_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the year level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_numbers" (
  "contact_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact number */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the contact number belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact number (e.g., mobile, landline, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_numbers_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, billing, mailing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the email belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email (e.g., personal, school, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "guardians" (
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guardian */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guardian */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the guardian */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guardian */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guardian */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the guardian to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guardian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guardian_contact_numbers" (
  "guardian_contact_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guardian contact number */,
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Guardian ID the contact number belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the guardian */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact number (e.g., mobile, landline, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guardian_contact_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guardian_contact_numbers_guardian_id FOREIGN KEY ("guardian_id") REFERENCES guardians ("guardian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the image belongs to */,
  "image_location" TEXT /* Location of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., profile, identification, report card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_guardians" (
  "student_guardian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-guardian relationship */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the relationship belongs to */,
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Guardian ID the relationship belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_guardian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_guardians_guardian_id FOREIGN KEY ("guardian_id") REFERENCES guardians ("guardian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_guardians_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the grade belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Subject ID the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student */,
  "grading_period" TEXT /* Grading period (e.g., quarterly, semester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the attendance record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance record (present/absent) */,
  "attendance_type" TEXT /* Type of attendance (e.g., regular, extra-curricular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the enrollment record belongs to */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* School year of the enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Student number the payment record belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., tuition, miscellaneous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_number FOREIGN KEY ("student_number") REFERENCES students ("student_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "fee_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)
